\tzpentry{ID3532}{Quantum Quantum State Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3532 introduces Quantum Quantum State Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \boxed{\,\Psi(R,\mathbf r,t)=\mathcal N\,F(R)\;G_\ell(r,\theta;\sigma_r(t)) \;\ast\; \Bigg[\int_{-\infty}^\infty e^{\tfrac{i}{\hbar} p (r + x_0)}\,\tilde{A}(p)\,dp\Bigg]\,} \]
